meaning: n.摩根马(美国佛蒙特州轻型马,与美国快马相似)
examples: Morgan dropped his cigarette and crushed it underfoot.
Bob Morgan has offered his resignation and it has been accepted.
Morgan borrowed $5,000 from his father to form the company 20 years ago.
Morgan Stanley chief investment strategist Byron Wien rode retailer Target to a 23% increase.
He jumped from Morgan Stanley and recruited four junior executives from other firms to join him.
